What I Offer

Services Built for Your Growth

From executive admin to creative design — I handle what holds you back so you can focus on what moves your business forward.

01
Admin Management

Scheduling, data entry, calendar management and workflow systems that keep operations running without friction.

02
Email Organisation

Inbox zero framework — sorting, flagging, professional drafting and a 48-hour follow-up protocol.

03
Social Media Management

7-day content calendars, on-brand Canva graphics and cross-platform scheduling for a consistent presence.

04
Research & Briefings

Market research, competitor analysis, executive briefings and lead generation backed by solid intelligence.

05
Customer Service

Client onboarding kits, FAQ documentation, SOPs and follow-ups handled with professionalism and care.

06
Design & Canva

Brand kits, presentations, marketing flyers and social graphics — polished, on-brand visuals via Canva Pro.

Why Choose Me

What Sets Me Apart

01
Detail-Oriented Workflow

Every task delivered with precision and on schedule. No shortcuts, no surprises, no loose ends.

02
Strong Communication

Responsive, professional and proactive. You are always informed — never left waiting for an update.

03
Organised Systems

SOPs and workflows built to keep your business running efficiently — with or without you watching.

04
Independent & Proactive

I anticipate needs and act before issues arise. Initiative is standard, not an exception.

05

06

I adapt to your tools, timezone and working style for a seamless, frictionless partnership.

How We Work Together

A Clear, Transparent Process

01
Discovery Call

We discuss your needs and goals. No commitment — just clarity on how I can best support you.

02
Agreement & Onboarding

We agree on scope, tools and timelines. I integrate into your workflow with minimal disruption.

03
Regular Updates

Daily or weekly check-ins keep you informed and in control — without the need to micromanage.

04
Organised Delivery

On time, fully documented, zero loose ends. Every task, every time — consistently.
